User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Interest Hub application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user (matches auth uid).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.
Timestamp indicating when the interest was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this interest.

Topic.title: Topic
Topic.description: Represents a topic within an interest.

description.description: A detailed description of the topic.

interestId.description: The ID of the parent interest.

parentId.description: The ID of the parent topic, if this is a sub-topic.

order.description: The display order of the topic within its level.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the topic was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this topic.

Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: Represents a goal within a topic.

description.description: A detailed description of the goal.

topicId.description: The ID of the parent topic.

startDate.description: The date and time when the goal starts.

endDate.description: The date and time when the goal is due.

status.description: The current status of the goal.

order.description: The display order of the goal.

customProperties.description: User-defined custom properties for the goal.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the goal was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this goal.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task associated with a goal or a topic.

notes.description: Additional notes or a detailed description for the task.

goalId.description: The ID of the parent goal. Optional.

topicId.description: The ID of the parent topic if not associated with a goal. Optional.

startDate.description: The date and time when the task is scheduled to start.

endDate.description: The date and time when the task is scheduled to end.

status.description: The current status of the task.

order.description: The display order of the task.

customProperties.description: User-defined custom properties for the task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the task was created.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this task.

WikiPage.title: Wiki Page
WikiPage.description: Represents a single page or entry in the knowledge wiki for a topic.

title.description: The title of the wiki page.

content.description: The content of the wiki page, likely in Markdown format.

topicId.description: The ID of the parent topic.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the page was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the page was last updated.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this page.

WatchRoom.title: Watch Room
WatchRoom.description: Represents a room for watching videos together.

name.description: The name of the watch room.

description.description: A short description for the watch room.

isPublic.description: Whether the room is visible to everyone.

showtime.description: The scheduled time for the video to start.

videoUrl.description: The URL of the video to watch.

currentTime.description: The current playback time in seconds.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The UID of the user who last updated the state.

participants.description: List of users currently in the room.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the room was created.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: Represents a chat message in a watch room.

BusinessCard.title: Business Card
BusinessCard.description: Represents a user's digital business card.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this card.

SalesPage.title: Sales Page
SalesPage.description: Represents a single, public-facing sales page.

title.description: The main headline or title of the sales page.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the page (e.g., 'my-amazing-product'). Must be unique.

content.description: The main content of the page, likely in Markdown or HTML format.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this page.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the page was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the page was last updated.

Channel.title: Channel
Channel.description: Represents a channel that can be associated with one or more topics, goals, or tasks, and contains social media links.

description.description: A short description of the channel.

topicIds.description: A list of topic IDs this channel is associated with.

goalIds.description: A list of goal IDs this channel is associated with.

taskIds.description: A list of task IDs this channel is associated with.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this channel.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the channel was created.

FCMToken.title: FCM Token
FCMToken.description: Represents a Firebase Cloud Messaging token for a user's device.

userId.description: The ID of the user this token belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the token was saved.

body.description: The body content of the notification.

sendAt.description: The specific time to send the notification.

isSent.description: Flag to indicate if the notification has been sent.

userId.description: The ID of the user who this notification is for.

link.description: Optional deep link for when the notification is clicked.

DeviceProfile.title: Device Profile
DeviceProfile.description: A snapshot of a user's device information, including hardware, browser, and permissions, at a specific point in time.

deviceName.description: A user-friendly name for the device, e.g., 'My Laptop'.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information. The document ID is the user's UID.

/users/{userId}/deviceProfiles/{profileI.description: Stores snapshots of device profiles for a user.

/interests/{interestId}.description: Top-level collection for interests. Contains a userId field for security rules.

/topics/{topicId}.description: Top-level collection for topics. Contains a userId field for security rules.

/goals/{goalId}.description: Top-level collection for goals. Contains a userId field for security rules.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Top-level collection for tasks. Contains a userId field for security rules.

/wikiPages/{wikiPageId}.description: Top-level collection for wiki pages. Contains a userId for security rules.

/watchRooms/{roomId}.description: Collection for synchronized video watch rooms.

/watchRooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId.description: Sub-collection for chat messages within a watch room.

/salesPages/{pageId}.description: Collection for public sales pages. Document ID is the page ID, contains a userId for ownership.

/channels/{channelId}.description: Collection for channels, which can be linked to topics and contain social media links.

/fcmTokens/{tokenId}.description: Stores FCM tokens for sending push notifications. The document ID is the token itself.

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Stores scheduled push notifications for users. Contains a userId for security rules.
